message:
🐛 Enable automatic skeleton display for all cards (#462)

- Default skeleton type to 'list' when not specified
- CardWrapper now shows skeleton automatically for loading cards
- Removes requirement to explicitly pass skeletonType prop
- Includes lint fixes from --fix

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
